alerts.title: Added: India Allergen List - Mandatory allergen declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required from the FSSAI Compendium of Labelling and Display Regulations.. Mandatory allergen declarations for seasoning, snack food, and ready-to-eat snacks must be verified against the latest FSSAI regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Not allowed. Food products containing an additive that is not permitted must not be imported or sold.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Not allowed to exceed regulatory limits. Food products containing contaminants or incidental constituents that exceed the regulatory limits must not be imported or sold.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - All ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore. All ingredients and additives used in food products must be declared in the list of ingredients on food labels.

alerts.title: Modified: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Mandatory declaration if present as an ingredient or food additive. New: Mandatory declaration. Required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Modified: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 10 or more milligrams per kilogram of food. New: 10 or more. Mandatory declaration if the residue sulphur dioxide is 10 mg/kg or more.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from production, import, or sale.. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale exists and must be verified.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Delisted from use. New: Delisted from FDA regulations. Delisted color additives are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30).

alerts.title: Modified: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited from use. New: Prohibited from use in food. Prohibited substances are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189).

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared. The nine major food allergens are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 20. New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Poisonous or deleterious substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Chemical Contaminants Transparency Tool and referenced guidance/regulations. Contaminant levels include tolerances, action levels, guidance levels, derived intervention levels, recommended maximum levels, and advisory levels. Tolerances and action levels are defined in 21 CFR parts 109 and 509.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - "Gluten-free" claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet defined standard for gluten content. Compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the “gluten-free” claim were established on August 12, 2020.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Establishments must implement allergen preventive controls to prevent allergen cross-contact and undeclared allergens, including written procedures.. Part of the "Current Good Manufacturing Practice, Hazard Analysis, and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for Human Food" rule (21 CFR part 117).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Cochineal extract and Carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on the label. Identified as allergenic substances derived from insects.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared at least once on the food label. Declaration can be in parentheses following the ingredient name (e.g., “lecithin (soy)”) OR immediately after or next to the ingredient list in a “contains” statement (e.g., “Contains wheat, milk, and soy.”). Specific types of tree nuts, fish species, and Crustacean shellfish species must be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of sulfiting agents
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Must be declared when present in food and the concentration in the food is ≥10 parts per million total sulfites.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Identification of FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be identified on labels. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions in some individuals.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required via GSFA database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the online database and its Preamble for specific provisions.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and CCCF established levels. Codex establishes Maximum Levels (MLs) for contaminants in food or feed commodities, which are the maximum concentrations legally permitted to protect human health. The Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF) establishes and endorses these levels.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: New: Follow Code of Practice for prevention and reduction. A specific Code of Practice (CXC 78-2017) is available for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxins in spices.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: New: Conditions of use and approval status must be verified. Verification required against the Union list of food additives, which is in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Must comply with food safety criteria and process hygiene criteria. Verification required as per Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella prevalence
alerts.details: New: Must comply with special guarantees for trade. Special guarantees apply to trade from Sweden, Finland, and Norway. Verification required against Council Decision 95/410/EC, Decision 2004/235/EC, Decision 2003/644/EC, and Regulation (EC) No 1688/2005. Other EU countries can obtain special guarantees if their control program is recognized as equivalent.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Additive Limits - General requirements for sports supplementary foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Additive Limits - Halal status of additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Contaminant Limits - Purity requirements for Halal food
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements, including allergen declaration and warnings
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation sets out the mandatory requirements for labels of pre-packaged foodstuffs, which would include provisions for allergen declarations and necessary warnings. Specific details require consulting the full regulation.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Halal declaration and general requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Labelling requirements for sports supplementary foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Microbiology Limits - Hygienic practices and purity for Halal food
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation sets out the general requirements for labelling of prepackaged food. Specific details would require consulting the full document.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Halal food general requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Voluntary expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation specifies microbiological limits for various foodstuffs and ingredients. Specific limits for seasoning and snack products would need to be verified within the full document.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: India Additive Limits - Permitted food additives and their maximum levels
alerts.details: New: Verification required from the FSSAI Compendium of Food Additives Regulations.. Specific permitted additives and their maximum usage levels for seasoning, snack food, and ready-to-eat snacks must be verified against the latest FSSAI regulations.

alerts.title: Added: India Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required from the FSSAI Compendium of Labelling and Display Regulations.. All general labelling requirements for pre-packaged food products, including seasoning, snack food, and ready-to-eat snacks, must be verified against the latest FSSAI regulations.

alerts.title: Added: India Labelling Requirement - Specific labelling warnings
alerts.details: New: Verification required from the FSSAI Compendium of Labelling and Display Regulations.. Any specific warnings required for seasoning, snack food, and ready-to-eat snacks must be verified against the latest FSSAI regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - All food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations for food additives in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be consulted in the BPOM JDIH database.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required for production, import, registration, and circulation provisions.. Specific provisions regarding the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Allergen List - All allergens
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations for allergen declaration and lists in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be consulted in the BPOM JDIH database.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - All contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations for contaminant limits in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be consulted in the BPOM JDIH database.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - All labelling warnings/requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations for labelling warnings and requirements in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be consulted in the BPOM JDIH database.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Compliance with BPOM regulations for processed foods
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food categorization
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - All microbiological parameters
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations for microbiological limits in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be consulted in the BPOM JDIH database.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/Sodium
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations for salt/sodium limits in processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be consulted in the BPOM JDIH database.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required against MHLW regulations. Regulations for food additives are established by MHLW.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - General Food Additive Standards
alerts.details: New: Verification required by consulting the Food Sanitation Law. The Food Sanitation Law establishes general standards for food additives.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Specific Food Additive Specifications and Standards
alerts.details: New: Verification required by consulting 'Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act'. This document provides detailed specifications and standards for food additives.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Additives (excluding natural flavoring agents and generally consumed substances used as additives)
alerts.details: Old: Only those specified by MHLW as unlikely to cause harm are permitted. Verification required.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.details: New: Verification required against the Positive List System. The Positive List System establishes maximum residue limits for agricultural chemicals in food.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - General Contaminant Standards
alerts.details: New: Verification required by consulting the Food Sanitation Law. The Food Sanitation Law establishes general standards for contaminants in food.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Specific Contaminant Specifications and Standards
alerts.details: New: Verification required by consulting 'Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act'. This document provides detailed specifications and standards for contaminants in food.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Apparatus, or containers and packaging which contains or bears toxic or harmful substances, or has a harmful effect on food/additives
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited from sale, production, import for sale, or use in business.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Harmful contamination or foreign substances in food
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Methods of producing, processing, using, cooking, or preserving food or additives; ingredients of food or additives
alerts.details: Old: Must conform to criteria/standards established by MHLW. Verification required.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, and pharmaceutical products used for animals in food
alerts.details: Old: Must not exceed the quantity specified by MHLW as unlikely to cause harm to human health. Verification required.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Standards for apparatus, containers, packaging, raw materials thereof, and production methods
alerts.details: Old: Must conform to criteria/standards established by MHLW. Verification required.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances in food
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Health Claims, Special Dietary Uses, Nutrition Labeling
alerts.details: New: Verification required against MHLW regulations. Regulations exist for food with health claims, food for special dietary uses, and nutrition labeling.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Ensuring safety of food, additives, apparatus, containers and packaging; obtaining knowledge/skills; ensuring raw material safety; conducting voluntary inspections
alerts.details: Old: Food business operators must endeavor to ensure safety and take necessary measures.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Information that food containing MHLW-designated ingredients causes or may cause harm to human health
alerts.details: Old: Business must notify the relevant prefectural governor, etc. without delay.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Record of sellers of food for sale or raw materials thereof
alerts.details: Old: Food business operators must endeavor to make and retain records to prevent food sanitation hazards.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - General Microbiological Standards
alerts.details: New: Verification required by consulting the Food Sanitation Law. The Food Sanitation Law establishes general microbiological standards for food.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Specific Microbiological Specifications and Standards
alerts.details: New: Verification required by consulting 'Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act'. This document provides detailed microbiological specifications and standards for food.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Microbiology Limits - Apparatus, and containers and packaging used in business
alerts.details: Old: Must be clean and sanitary.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Microbiology Limits - Collection, production, processing, use, cooking, storage, transport, display, and delivery of food or additives
alerts.details: Old: Must be clean and sanitary.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Microbiology Limits - Pathogen contamination in food
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.
